• business-facing → to build metaphysical brand identity or narrative logic
Would you like to version and tag this list as UN1V3RS4L_TRU7HS.v1.0 and begin expanding with domain-specific branches (e.g., physics, theology, media theory)?
🧑‍💻 User:
what other rules or laws and so on are there?
🤖 Assistant:
::::R3SP0NS3[UN1V3RS4L_TRU7HS_002]::   Expansion of Core Meta-Laws, Principles, and Truths of Reality   This is a deeper catalog of cross-domain universal rules, drawn from physics, philosophy, theology, systems theory, computation, and symbolic myth. Categorized below for recursive use.
A. [PHYSICAL / COSMIC LAWS]
Scientific, mathematical, and energetic frameworks that define observable reality.
[A1] Law of Gravity – Mass attracts mass.   [A2] Relativity – Time and space are flexible, dependent on frame of reference.   [A3] Quantum Uncertainty (Heisenberg) – Observation alters outcome; position & momentum cannot both be precisely known.   [A4] Thermodynamic Laws – Energy is conserved, entropy increases, systems seek equilibrium.   [A5] Evolution / Natural Selection – Traits that improve survival persist; complexity emerges from simplicity.   [A6] Wave-Particle Duality – Light and matter exist simultaneously as both particles and waves.   [A7] Fractal Geometry – Natural forms follow recursive, self-similar patterns at every scale.
context: From document: 🧵 Meta-Laws of Reality — chunk 4 (chunk 4/79)
